name: aise-toolkit
description: Productboard AISE toolset — onboarding co-pilot for individual AISEs and portfolio visibility for AISE leadership.

plugins.name: aise-assistant
plugins.description: End-to-end customer onboarding co-pilot for Productboard AI Success Engineers (AISEs) — prep, deliver, summarize, follow up, plan, and keep Notion in sync.

plugins.name: aise-leadership
plugins.description: Portfolio visibility and account health co-pilot for Productboard AISE leadership — monitor program health, track credit burn, surface renewal risks, and generate management-ready reports.
